AgentConfig.title: AgentConfig
AgentConfig.description: Configuration schema for the AI WhatsApp Agent

avatarImage.description: Base64 encoded or camera uploaded avatar image URL

bio.description: Bio description of the AI Agent

systemPrompt.description: Prompt containing system rules and personality of the AI agent

toneStyle.description: Conversation tone of the AI Agent

faq.description: Pre-configured FAQ items for knowledge base

selectedModel.description: The selected AI model to power the WhatsApp Agent

isFallbackActive.description: Whether the synthetic local fallback is currently active

fallbackReason.description: The reason the synthetic local fallback is active

users/{userId}/config/default.description: The custom persistent configuration for a signed-in user's WhatsApp AI Agent
